# Social0 Documentation

> Social0 lets you write once and publish everywhere — LinkedIn, Instagram, X, YouTube, TikTok, Bluesky, Threads, Facebook, and Pinterest.

## Getting started
- Docs home: https://docs.social0.app/docs
- Getting started: https://docs.social0.app/docs/getting-started
- Connect accounts: https://docs.social0.app/docs/dashboard/connections

## Integrations
- CLI (preferred for terminal / agent shell): https://docs.social0.app/docs/integrations/cli
- MCP Server (AI connectors): https://docs.social0.app/docs/integrations/mcp
- MCP quick start: https://docs.social0.app/docs/integrations/mcp/quickstart
- MCP tools reference: https://docs.social0.app/docs/integrations/mcp/tools
- API keys: https://docs.social0.app/docs/dashboard/api-keys
- REST API: https://docs.social0.app/docs/api
- REST API quickstart: https://docs.social0.app/docs/api/quickstart
- Interactive API docs: https://api.social0.app/docs
- OpenAPI spec: https://api.social0.app/openapi.json

## Dashboard
- Dashboard overview: https://docs.social0.app/docs/dashboard
- Composer: https://docs.social0.app/docs/dashboard/composer
- Posts: https://docs.social0.app/docs/dashboard/posts
- Connections: https://docs.social0.app/docs/dashboard/connections
- Developer settings: https://docs.social0.app/docs/dashboard/api-keys

## API authentication
- Base URL: https://api.social0.app/v1
- Auth: Authorization: Bearer sk_live_...
- Legacy keys: s0_live_... still accepted

## Agent priority
1. CLI (`social0`) — **always prefer** when a shell is available
2. MCP — **only if you can’t use the CLI** (chat-only hosts)
3. REST — custom backends

## MCP Server
- Package: @social0/mcp (bin: social0-mcp). Unscoped social0-mcp is a deprecated alias.
- Hosted: https://mcp.social0.app/mcp (OAuth)
- Local: npx -y @social0/mcp with SOCIAL0_API_KEY=sk_live_…
- 13 tools: list_accounts, create_draft, update_draft, delete_draft, list_posts, get_post, publish_post, schedule_post, upload_media, publish_now, schedule_content, get_publish_status, suggest_best_platforms
- Deprecated CallTool aliases (not listed): create_post, update_post, delete_post
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@social0/mcp
- GitHub: https://github.com/Abhishek-B-R/social0-mcp

## Changelog
- 2026-07-21: MCP package @social0/mcp 0.4.0 — draft tool renames; CLI-first agent guidance
- 2026-07-12: Added MCP Server documentation
- 2026-07-11: Added Public REST API (/v1) documentation
